results.title: Cheesohm announces next edition of “Dance with Cheesohm” after Afrobeats class in Lekki
results.description: Nigerian lifestyle influencer, content creator and dance enthusiast Ntumobe Chisom, popularly known as Cheesohm, has announced the next edition of "Dance with Cheesohm", following the success of her recent Afro Beats dance class held in Lekki, Lagos. The post Cheesohm announces next edition of “Dance with Cheesohm” after Afrobeats class in Lekki appeared first on Vanguard News .
